name: a11y-checker-killer
title: a11y-checker — the bug the linter everyone trusts walks past

setup.run: [ -n "$(find demo/.cache/easy-ui -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | head -1)" ] || { mkdir -p demo/.cache && { cp -R experiments/stack-matrix/.cache/DarkInventor__easy-ui demo/.cache/easy-ui 2>/dev/null || git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/DarkInventor/easy-ui demo/.cache/easy-ui; }; }

acts.title: THE KILLER CUT — eslint-clean vs a11y-checker on real shadcn code

say: easy-ui — a shadcn kit people install. Here's its share button, real repo.
The linter everyone runs — eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y, recommended.
steps.run: npx eslint --no-config-lookup --config demo/jsx-a11y.config.mjs demo/.cache/easy-ui/components/ShareButtons.tsx && echo '✓ clean — 0 problems'

say: a11y-checker, same file. Icon-only button, no accessible name — a screen reader just says 'button'.
And it's not one — across easy-ui's components, every icon-only button is nameless. eslint passed every one.
steps.run: a11y check demo/.cache/easy-ui/components --json | jq -r '[.findings[] | select(.ruleId=="enforce/button-no-name")] | length | "\(.) icon-only buttons with no accessible name — eslint passed every one."'

stdoutContains: icon-only buttons with no accessible name

say: Real kit. Real bug. The linter everyone trusts walked right past it.
steps.run: echo 'eslint: clean   ·   a11y-checker: caught the bug your users feel'
